consumer_adoption.discovery: Atlas consumers read this versioned Playbook registry by reference and record local adoption evidence against its stable IDs.
consumer_adoption.copying_rule: Atlas must not copy this registry into a second canonical doctrine store; any local projection is read-only and links back to these records.

records.statement: Owner repositories retain implementation and repo-local truth; coordination consumers read that truth without replacing it.
records.rationale: Separating owner truth from routing and visibility prevents competing canonical stores.

evidence.note: Names owner-repo truth and prohibits a second truth store.

enforcement.mechanism: Contract review and consumer conformance checks.

exceptions: A declared compatibility projection may preserve canonical fields and source references.

records.statement: Candidate knowledge remains advisory until reviewed and promoted through the governed evidence path.
records.rationale: Unreviewed observations must not silently become governance.

evidence.note: States that candidate knowledge is not enforced governance.

enforcement.mechanism: Promotion review and receipt-based lifecycle controls.

records.statement: Move a marker or claim completion only after current verification, receipt, and reconciliation evidence exists.
records.rationale: Recovered prose, summaries, and percentages are not current operating truth.

evidence.note: Rejects recovered status claims as current truth and forbids marker movement from the import.

enforcement.mechanism: Admission source hierarchy and owner receipt review.

records.statement: Normalize evidence, retain lineage, classify a candidate, review it, and record promotion without destroying predecessor history.
records.rationale: Replayable provenance makes doctrine inspectable and demotable when contradicted.

evidence.note: Defines evidence bundles, classification, audited promotion, and retained lineage.

enforcement.mechanism: Knowledge lifecycle and promotion receipt surfaces.

records.statement: Treating draft, stale, or insufficiently evidenced guidance as canonical doctrine creates governance drift.
records.rationale: Canonical status needs a current evidence lineage and review boundary.

evidence.note: Lists premature canonicalization as a failure mode.

enforcement.mechanism: Registry validation requires canonical evidence for promoted doctrine.

records.statement: Playbook publishes the reusable doctrine registry; Atlas adopts and checks conformance through source-linked consumption rather than copying doctrine.
records.rationale: A shared registry needs one canonical owner while Atlas retains cross-stack adoption responsibility.

evidence.note: Requires consumers to reference owner artifacts directly rather than copy them.
Classifies the recovered material as provenance import rather than current authority.

enforcement.mechanism: Registry validator and Atlas adoption evidence review.

exceptions: Atlas may retain source-linked local adoption evidence without re-publishing doctrine.

records.statement: A review summary, plan, board, or marker can claim more progress than current code and evidence prove.
records.rationale: The imported review skill identified the risk, while the canonical rule now defines the governed control.

evidence.note: Current Atlas hierarchy establishes the authoritative replacement control.

records.statement: Treat imported plan status or percentages as current operating truth.
records.rationale: This recovered-plan posture is retained solely to preserve why it is no longer admissible.

excludes: Current runtime, repository, receipt, and board readback

evidence.note: Explicitly rejects recovered prose and percentages as current truth.

enforcement.mechanism: Admission classification prevents imported status from moving markers.

supersession.retired_reason: Retired by the Atlas admission current-truth rule; retained as provenance history only.

records.statement: Choose the smallest safe, evidence-producing next execution packet after project reconciliation.
records.rationale: The imported review skill proposes this useful routing heuristic, but no current canonical source was found that promotes this exact formulation.

evidence.note: Imported skill specified one honest next step.

enforcement.mechanism: Candidate only; requires canonical evidence and review before promotion.

exceptions: The caller may explicitly authorize parallel review lanes.
